name: Turkey Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup green onions with tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add potatoes, turkey, onions, flour and salt; mix well.
3. Heat about 1/4 inch of oil in a large skillet.
4. Pour batter by 1/3 cupfuls into hot oil.
5. Fry 5-6 minutes on each side or until potatoes are tender and pancakes are golden brown.
6. Serve with cranberry sauce if desired.
